title: Delta President on Middle East Flights & Premium Travel
summary: Delta Airlines President Peter Carter speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on Middle East, Rhiad flights and premium travel.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delta's Peter Carter on Consumer Premium Travel Appetite
summary: Delta Airlines President Peter Carter speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on consumers "insatiable appetite" for premium travel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JetBlue CEO Speaks on Potential Consolidation at IATA
summary: JetBlue CEO Joanna Geraghty speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on potential consolidation saying "never say never". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Steps Up as G7’s Lead Hawk With Interest-Rate Hike Primed
summary: A euro-zone interest-rate hike in the coming week is set to place the European Central Bank at the vanguard of global tightening caused by the Iran war.

title: IATA Director Willie Walsh on Rising Cost of Jet Fuel
summary: The International Air Transport Association (IATA) Director Willie Walsh speaks on how the cost of jet fuel will provide an incentive for refineries to increase production. (Source: Bloomberg)
